---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability aligned with the roadmap tracks
labels: []
title: "[Feature]: "
---

## Problem
_Which gap or workflow does this feature address? Reference packages such as `internal/service/...` or `kubeop-operator/...`._

## Outcome
_Clear statement of the desired behaviour or user impact._

## Scope
- **In**: _Bullet the components/files you will change._
- **Out**: _Explicitly state related work you will not tackle now._

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] _List verifiable behaviours, tests, or docs that demonstrate completion._

## Dependencies
_List blocking issues, migrations, or external systems._

## Risks & mitigation
_Security, performance, or rollout concerns and how to address them._

## Estimation
- Size: ☐ S ☐ M ☐ L
- Target phase: ☐ Near-term (0–6 w) ☐ Mid-term (6–12 w) ☐ Later (12+ w)
- Track: ☐ Delivery ☐ API ☐ Data ☐ Ops ☐ Security ☐ UX ☐ Docs
- Labels applied: `phase:<value>`, `track:<value>`, `size:<value>`

## Owner
_Who is responsible?_

## RICE inputs (optional for triage)
- Reach:
- Impact:
- Confidence (0–1):
- Effort (person-weeks):

## Testing & validation plan
_Describe unit/integration tests (`go test`, `npm run docs:*`, etc.) and manual checks._

## Documentation updates
_List README/docs pages to update (link to sections)._
